data.name: Neutral reference module for web flows in OMP. The page shows a module overview and links onward to the module's configurations.
data.value: Neutral reference module for web flows in OMP. The page shows a module overview and links onward to the module's configurations.

data.name: Continue to the configuration view to review or update the module's current sample configurations.
data.value: Continue to the configuration view to review or update the module's current sample configurations.

data.name: Update comment and JSON content for the selected configuration.
data.value: Update comment and JSON content for the selected configuration.

data.name: Configurations for Example Web App Module. These values are used by the example module and can be edited without leaving the module interface.
data.value: Configurations for Example Web App Module. These values are used by the example module and can be edited without leaving the module interface.

data.name: Send a personal test notification to the current OMP user.
data.value: Send a personal test notification to the current OMP user.

data.name: This notification was sent from ExampleModule.
data.value: This notification was sent from ExampleModule.

data.name: This banner was sent from ExampleModule.
data.value: This banner was sent from ExampleModule.

data.name: This level 1 banner was sent from ExampleModule.
data.value: This level 1 banner was sent from ExampleModule.

data.name: This level 2 banner was sent from ExampleModule.
data.value: This level 2 banner was sent from ExampleModule.

data.name: This level 3 banner was sent from ExampleModule.
data.value: This level 3 banner was sent from ExampleModule.

data.name: This banner was sent from ExampleModule to portal admins.
data.value: This banner was sent from ExampleModule to portal admins.

data.name: This page embeds OpenDocViewer by passing a session URL to a Portable Document Bundle endpoint in the hosting web application.
data.value: This page embeds OpenDocViewer by passing a session URL to a Portable Document Bundle endpoint in the hosting web application.

data.name: The sample document is OpenDocViewer public/sample.pdf.
data.value: The sample document is OpenDocViewer public/sample.pdf.
